segments.text: Now you can earn side income using
government apps. And this is the best
time to be Gen Z because you have access
to opportunities millennials simply
didn't have. Today you can earn, learn,
and build credibility directly through
governmentbacked platforms. First, my
gov. You can earn by solving paid
quizzes, doing surveys, entering
national contests for blog writing and
video creation. Winners take home cash
prizes worth lacks. Second, Skill India
digital hub. Learn AI, coding, finance,
digital skills for free. Get verified
certificates and it can open up direct
job opportunities paying 25,000 rupees
to 1.5 lak rupees per month. Third,
government e procurement. If you're a
Gen Z founder or side hustler, you can
sell directly to the Indian government
by bidding for official tenders. Share
this with someone who needs it. Follow
full disclosure for real money and
career insights.
